task_title: Set up the first Claude Code handoff procedure
task_objective: Prepare the first bounded worker handoff so Claude Code can read a directive from .cockpit/handoff/worker-directive.md and return evidence to .cockpit/result/worker-result.md.
completion_criteria: A clear worker handoff procedure is defined for this repo.
The worker directive tells Claude Code exactly what to read, what to do, and where to write results.
The required evidence and return format are explicit.
The procedure stays within V1 lean scope and does not introduce app code yet.

allowed: Update docs or examples directly related to the handoff procedure.
Define the worker return path and expected evidence format.
forbidden: Do not build app code yet.
Do not add paid API dependencies.
Do not introduce broad orchestration or automation.
Do not change canonical project goals or verification verdicts.

required_evidence: Confirmation that forbidden scope was not touched.
current_blocker: Claude Code is not yet connected to this project workflow.
next_action: Give the worker the runtime handoff procedure and capture the first returned result file.
